# WNBA Card Collector — Session Progress Log
# Updated by Claude at the end of every session. Do not edit manually mid-session.
# Format: newest session at the top.

---

## Session: April 17, 2026 — Phase 2 · Bug Fixes + Auto-Create + Front/Back Support

### Completed This Session
- Added front + back image support throughout the full scan pipeline
  - Upload route accepts `front` + `back` multipart fields; stores both to Storage
  - Edge Functions accept `front_image_base64`, `back_image_base64` inline (bypasses Storage download)
  - Stage 2 prompt updated to use both images when back is provided
  - Scan page `ImageZone` component handles front/back capture separately
- Decoupled AI pipeline from Storage: images passed as inline base64 so scan works even if Storage upload fails
- Fixed "Failed to create scan session" (500): upload route was inserting `front_image_path`/`back_image_path` columns that don't exist until migration 00002 runs; removed them from insert
- Fixed "Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code": all Edge Functions now always return HTTP 200; errors returned in body as `{ error: "..." }` so callers always see the real message
- Fixed POST /api/scan/confirm 500: `upsertSet`/`upsertCard` were inserting `needs_review: true` before migration 00003 ran; fixed with two-step pattern (insert without column, then best-effort update that silently fails if column absent)
- Implemented auto-create checklist entries on confirm
  - `upsertSet()`: case-insensitive match on name + year; creates set if not found
  - `upsertCard()`: exact match on set_id + card_number; creates card if not found
  - Auto-created rows flagged with `needs_review = true` for later cleanup
  - Confirm always works — no checklist required
- Scan page shows note "will be added automatically and flagged for review" when card_id is null
- Added migration `20260417000002_phase2_back_image.sql`: `front_image_path` + `back_image_path` columns on `scan_sessions`
- Added migration `20260417000003_needs_review_flag.sql`: `needs_review boolean` on `sets` and `cards` + partial index
- Created `src/lib/database.types.ts`: full typed `Database` interface for all 13 tables, Row/Insert/Update types, convenience aliases

### Phase Checklist Updates
- [x] Front + back image capture in scan UI
- [x] Inline base64 image transport to Edge Functions (no Storage dependency)
- [x] Auto-create set/card on confirm (no checklist required)
- [x] needs_review flag for auto-created rows
- [x] Migration-resilient inserts (works at any migration state)
- [x] database.types.ts with full schema coverage

### Decisions Made
- All Edge Functions return HTTP 200 — errors in body. Supabase `functions.invoke` drops body on non-2xx, so this is required for error visibility.
- Auto-create on confirm is the right UX: never block a user from adding a card they physically own.
- `needs_review` flag (not a separate table) for cleanup queue — simple, queryable via partial index.

### In-Flight / Partially Done
- None

### Blockers / Open Questions
- All three migrations (00001, 00002, 00003) must be applied in order
- Edge Functions must be deployed: `supabase functions deploy scan-stage1 scan-stage2`
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set as Supabase Edge Function secret

### Next Session: Start Here
- Smoke test full flow: upload front+back → Stage 1 → Stage 2 → confirm → collection entry
- Verify `needs_review` queue works (check sets + cards tables after scan)
- Begin Phase 3: Want List + Goals

---

## Session: April 17, 2026 — Phase 2 · Scan Pipeline

### Completed This Session
- Created Supabase Storage bucket migration (`20260417000001_phase2_storage.sql`)
  - `card-images` bucket, 10MB limit, JPEG/PNG/WebP/HEIC only
  - RLS: users can upload/read/delete their own images (path-scoped by user_id)
- Built `supabase/functions/scan-stage1/index.ts` Edge Function
  - Accepts session_id + image_url, downloads image from Storage
  - Calls claude-sonnet-4-6 Vision with Stage 1 system prompt
  - Tries to match result against checklist DB (cards table)
  - Saves scan_results rows + updates session status to `identified`
  - Returns top 3 candidates with confidence scores
- Built `supabase/functions/scan-stage2/index.ts` Edge Function
  - Accepts session_id + selected card identity
  - Fetches parallels from DB for the set; filters by print_run if serial detected
  - Calls claude-sonnet-4-6 Vision with Stage 2 system prompt + parallel descriptors
  - Updates rank-1 scan_result with parallel classification
  - Returns top 3 parallel candidates with reasoning
- Built `src/app/api/scan/upload/route.ts`
  - Accepts multipart form upload, validates file type
  - Uploads to `card-images/{user_id}/{timestamp}.{ext}` in Supabase Storage
  - Creates scan_session record, returns session_id + image_url
- Built `src/app/api/scan/confirm/route.ts`
  - Validates session ownership, writes to collection table
  - Marks scan_session confirmed + scan_result rank-1 confirmed=true
- Built full scan page UI (`src/app/scan/page.tsx`)
  - 5 stages: idle → uploading → identifying → classifying → confirming → success
  - Manual entry fallback ("None of these")
  - Editable fields on confirmation: player, set, card#, serial, condition, cost, date
  - Confidence indicator (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with color coding
  - Expandable AI reasoning panel
  - Candidate navigator (prev/next for top 3 candidates)
  - Low-confidence warning banner
- Updated `tailwind.config.ts` with full WNBA color palette + font-display variable
- Updated `src/styles/globals.css` with WNBA dark theme, `.input-field` component class
- Updated `src/app/layout.tsx` with Barlow Condensed + Inter fonts (Google Fonts)
- Excluded `supabase/functions` from Next.js tsconfig (Deno code, not Node)
- TypeScript: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes clean

### Phase Checklist Updates
- [x] Phase 1 complete
- [x] Supabase Storage bucket migration for card images
- [x] Image upload API route (camera/photo picker)
- [x] Stage 1 Edge Function (Claude Vision — card identity)
- [x] Stage 2 Edge Function (Claude Vision — parallel classification)
- [x] Serial number detection + candidate filtering logic
- [x] Scan confirmation UI (top 3 candidates, confidence, reasoning)
- [x] Confirm → write to collection
- [x] "None of these" → manual entry fallback
- [x] Scan session logging

### Decisions Made
- Used `claude-sonnet-4-6` (not `claude-3-5-sonnet` as originally specified in PRD — updated to current model)
- Edge Functions use Deno URL imports; excluded from Next.js tsconfig
- Storage paths scoped as `{user_id}/{timestamp}.{ext}` for RLS enforcement
- Stage 2 skips if no matched card_id from Stage 1 (avoids noise on unknown cards)
- Manual entry requires card to exist in checklist (keeps collection data integrity)

### In-Flight / Partially Done
- None — Phase 2 fully implemented

### Blockers / Open Questions
- Supabase Storage bucket must be created by running the migration (`20260417000001_phase2_storage.sql`)
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set in Supabase Edge Function environment secrets
- Edge Functions must be deployed: `supabase functions deploy scan-stage1 scan-stage2`

### Next Session: Start Here
- Deploy Edge Functions to Supabase
- Run Phase 2 storage migration
- Smoke test full scan flow: upload → stage1 → stage2 → confirm → collection
- Begin Phase 3: Want List + Goals

---

- [ ] Phase 2 scaffold present

- Marked current file update as a progress note only.

- None

## Session: April 17, 2026 — Phase 1 · Iconography Update

### Completed This Session
- Installed @phosphor-icons/react package
- Updated BottomNav component to use Phosphor icons (Basketball, Camera, Star, Target, ShoppingCart) instead of emoji
- Fixed tsconfig.json ignoreDeprecations setting from "6.0" to "5.0"
- Updated styling-guidelines.md to specify @phosphor-icons/react as the icon library
- Validated TypeScript compilation and committed all changes
- Pushed changes to GitHub repository

### Phase Checklist Updates
- [x] Next.js scaffold with App Router and TypeScript
- [x] Supabase integration with dedicated schema and RLS policies
- [x] Google OAuth authentication flow
- [x] Mobile-first responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- [x] Bottom navigation with standardized Phosphor icons
- [x] Auth guards on protected routes
- [x] Database schema with integrity constraints
- [x] Code review fixes for security and UX issues
- [x] GitHub repository setup and documentation
- [x] Environment template and build validation

### Decisions Made
- Standardized on Phosphor icons over emoji for better accessibility and consistency
- Fixed tsconfig.json ignoreDeprecations to use correct string value "5.0"

### In-Flight / Partially Done
- None - Phase 1 fully completed

### Blockers / Open Questions
- None - ready for Phase 2

### Next Session: Start Here
- Begin Phase 2: Implement AI-powered card scanning with Claude Vision API
- Create /scan route with camera integration
- Set up Claude Vision API integration for card identification
- Design card data models and scanning workflow

### Key Files Touched
- src/components/BottomNav.tsx (updated to use Phosphor icons)
- tsconfig.json (fixed ignoreDeprecations setting)
- styling-guidelines.md (updated icon library specification)
- package.json (added @phosphor-icons/react dependency)
- claude-progress.txt (this file)
